name: AI Refer
description: Open reference packs for AI agents working on UI generation, product design, and code architecture.

packs.title: How To Extract Guidelines
packs.when_to_use: Use before creating or revising any AI Refer reference pack.

packs.title: UI UX Fundamentals
packs.when_to_use: Use before designing, implementing, polishing, or reviewing any user interface.

packs.title: Web App UI
packs.when_to_use: Use when designing, implementing, or reviewing SaaS products, dashboards, admin panels, internal tools, CRMs, analytics apps, and data-heavy web workflows.

packs.title: Mobile App UI
packs.when_to_use: Use when generating, implementing, or reviewing mobile app interfaces and native-like phone experiences.

packs.title: UX Design
packs.when_to_use: Use when creating or reviewing product concepts, UX flows, PRDs, prototypes, feature specs, product critiques, or experience audits.

packs.title: Product Requirements
packs.when_to_use: Use when writing or reviewing PRDs, feature specs, user stories, acceptance criteria, implementation briefs, or product handoff notes.

packs.title: Code Architecture
packs.when_to_use: Use before creating, restructuring, or reviewing modules, services, APIs, data flows, dependencies, tests, observability, rollout, or major code changes.

packs.title: Frontend Architecture
packs.when_to_use: Use before creating, restructuring, or reviewing frontend routes, rendering strategy, state placement, data fetching, components, forms, accessibility, performance, or frontend tests.
